'''Benjamin (Ben) "Danger" Davies''' (born 2 November 1989) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who last played as a {{rlp|pr}} for [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham]] in [[RFL League 1|Kingstone Press League 1]]. He has previously played for:-
* [[Wigan Warriors]]
* [[Widnes Vikings]]
* [[Workington Town]]
* [[South Wales Ironmen|South Wales Scorpions]]
* [[Barrow Raiders]]
* [[Castleford Tigers]]
* [[Halifax RLFC]]
* [[Whitehaven RLFC]]

==Background==
[[Wigan]], [[Greater Manchester, England]].

==Career==
He signed for the [[Wigan Warriors]] from local [[Amateur sports|amateur]] team [[Leigh East A.R.L.F.C.|Leigh East]].

He has junior representative honours with [[Lancashire]] (at under 14s and 15s level) and [[England national rugby league team|England]] (under 15s and 18s.)<ref name="Wigan Profile">{{cite web|url=http://www.wiganwarriors.com/SquadMember.asp?teamid=1&id=216|title=Wigan Profile|publisher=wiganwarriors.com|date=9 December 2009|accessdate=2009-12-09}} {{Dead link|date=October 2010|bot=H3llBot}}</ref> At the start of 2010, he was sent out on loan to [[Widnes Vikings|Widnes]]. After impressing on his one-month loan, he was dual registered with the Chemics. He made his [[Super League]] début off the bench against [[Crusaders Rugby League|Crusaders]] on 22 May 2010. Ben has previously played for [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]].
